name: The Jenny McCarthy Show
overview: The Jenny McCarthy Show is an American pop culture-based talk show on VH1. The series is hosted by Jenny McCarthy and premiered on February 8, 2013 at 10:30 PM ET/PT. VH1 has added an additional seven episodes to the series' original eight-episode first season. Due to McCarthy joining The View, it is unknown if The Jenny McCarthy Show will return.

trailers.title: Celeb Spotlight: Interview with Jenny McCarthy
